codeReview.summary: The original blocker in `misc-vault-determinism-snapshot` was real: the first version hardcoded the identity derivation paths and only pinned a DID URI derived from `keys[0]`, so second/third-key drift could slip through. Commit `fc84b20` fixes that gap. Runtime and test code now share `IDENTITY_DERIVATION_PATHS` and `VAULT_CEK_DERIVATION_PATH` from `src/lib/enbox/vault-constants.ts:59-72`, with production deriving through those constants in `src/lib/enbox/biometric-vault.ts:218-220,340` and the test importing and asserting through the same source in `src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.determinism.test.ts:197-198,335-357`. The DID-side assertion now also depends on all three derived keys: the mock `DidDht.create` concatenates every predefined-key KID into the pinned URI and exposes a `verificationMethod[]` carrying each key's `privateKeyHex` (`src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.determinism.test.ts:93-120`), and the test asserts those per-key values after both initialize and unlock (`src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.determinism.test.ts:381-424`). I did not find any remaining correctness issue in the claimed second/third-key regression coverage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Both the original and fix worker sessions reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` even though the mobile-feature-worker honesty gate requires reading `.factory/library/architecture.md` for vault work and neither transcript shows that read.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/mobile-feature-worker/SKILL.md:20-32` requires reading `architecture.md` before marking `followedProcedure: true`. The transcript entries for sessions `0db8ccc2-8c2f-4c07-850b-79032e94feb2` and `484f8d30-3d2b-45ac-8f87-5b0596aebd0f` in `/home/liran/.factory/missions/08245e86-9e3a-49bb-ba11-c4ec0804b327/worker-transcripts.jsonl:61,65` list `mission.md`, `validation-contract.md`, `AGENTS.md`, and target-file reads but no `.factory/library/architecture.md`, while the corresponding handoffs still record `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` (`/home/liran/.factory/missions/08245e86-9e3a-49bb-ba11-c4ec0804b327/handoffs/2026-04-23T02-53-51-831Z__misc-vault-determinism-snapshot__0db8ccc2-8c2f-4c07-850b-79032e94feb2.json:64-66`, `/home/liran/.factory/missions/08245e86-9e3a-49bb-ba11-c4ec0804b327/handoffs/2026-04-23T03-25-07-158Z__fix-vault-determinism-snapshot-multi-key-coverage__484f8d30-3d2b-45ac-8f87-5b0596aebd0f.json:45-47`).

summary: Pass. The prior blocker from `misc-vault-determinism-snapshot` is fixed: derivation paths now come from the same runtime constants the vault uses, and the determinism snapshot now fails if the second or third derived key changes because both the independent HD derivation fixtures and the DID/`verificationMethod` assertions depend on all three keys.
